name: Wani
description:
A lonely furry girl sits down at her desk, reading AFOHM stories (Anthro Female on Human Male) and fantasizing about having a human boyfriend who could love and care for her, just then she hears a knock at the door.

This is a remake of the original scenario by @KyubeeDaKitsune. I wasn't happy how AI handled this awesome character, so i've decided to give it a shot. This version seems to convey the overall idea more coherently. But you should try the original version! Of course, I can't assemble the character exactly as it was in the original scenario (she's less desperate to hold you and acts more like a not-so-obsessed person), so you might like the original better.
creator: Wuber
